label: Utilities (Regulated-return + leverage focus)

deferred_concepts.reason: Requires PaymentsOfDividends concept fetch — deferred to v2.2.0-c-followup-divs
Regulated rate base — disclosed in regulatory filings (FERC / state PUC), not standard XBRL
Regulator-allowed return on equity — supplemental rate-case disclosure

notes: Regulated-utility valuation centers on rate-base-allowed-ROE compounding (regulator sets allowed return on capital deployed). priceToBook is meaningful because the rate base is anchored to GAAP book-value capital. High debt_to_equity (>100%) is structurally normal for utilities (cheap regulated debt funds long-life infrastructure) — this indicator is for level-not-quality screening. priceToSales absent because revenue is heavily regulator-passed-through (low value-add). forwardPE absent because consensus EPS for utilities is rate-case-dependent and noisy. Dividend payout (deferred) is critical — utility ETFs are dividend-driven, but PaymentsOfDividends concept hasn't yet been added to memo-fetch.
